codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `95a58926` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_95a58926/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_95a58926/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_95a58926/generator.py).

The rule is: detect the noisy lattice as the rows and columns with no `0`s, rebuild those lines in gray `5`, and place the single accent color only at row/column intersections. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples. No new primitive was needed.

The generator matches the task family by sampling a latent period-`4/5/6` lattice first, then injecting accent-color corruption both off-lattice and on lattice cells while preserving exactly the intended no-zero rows and columns. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, and generated verification passed `1000/1000`. I also spot-checked generated examples from the built JSON for distribution sanity.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/95a58926/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/95a58926/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/95a58926/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/95a58926/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/95a58926/previews/preview_03.png).
